message:
fix(mux): fix single Ctrl+C shutdown and render loop frame timing

- Use shutdown() before close() on listener sockets to reliably
  interrupt blocked accept() on Linux
- Add shutdown eventfd to WS server so connection threads wake
  immediately via poll() instead of waiting for 100ms read timeout
- Wake render loop from signal handler via wake_signal.notify()
- Fix render loop wait calculation to use last_frame as anchor,
  eliminating up to 33ms of unnecessary keyboard input latency
